title: asparagaceae
intro: The Asparagaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the asparagus family. This family consists of approximately 1,676 species of plants, including asparagus, hyacinth, and lilyturf, among others. Asparagaceae plants are typically herbaceous perennials with long, thin stems and narrow leaves, often producing showy flowers in shades of white, purple, and blue. The family Asparagaceae is widespread, found in temperate and tropical regions around the world, and includes both ornamental and edible species.
